description.p: You learn to practice the ancestral art of rune carving, inscribing temporary runes with powerful effects.

Rune Knowledge. You learn three runes of your choice from the Rune Knight's Rune Carver feature. You can inscribe a number of runes equal to the number you know on objects that can be used or held, doing so once per day during a short or long rest.

Rune Activation. When you finish a short or long rest, you can inscribe your known runes onto objects you touch. An inscribed rune remains until you inscribe your runes again, or until an object is destroyed.
Rune Saving Throws. If a rune requires a saving throw, the DC is calculated as follows:

center.p: Rune save DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Constitution modifier

description.p: Rune Options. You use the same rune options available to the Rune Knight's Rune Carver class feature.

sheet.description: You can inscribe up to 3 runes on objects once per day. Rune save DC: {{rune save dc}}. Uses Rune Carver options from Rune Knight.
